description_long: This object is a stylized representation of an AK-pattern assault rifle, featuring a long, straight stock and a curved magazine. The body is composed of a single, uniform blue material, giving it a monolithic appearance. The rifle includes a prominent barrel with a front sight post, a gas tube above the barrel, and a rear sight block. The stock is fixed and extends straight back, while the handguard and receiver are integrated into the main body. The magazine is curved and protrudes downward, typical of AK-style rifles. The overall surface is matte and lacks intricate detailing, with a smooth, slightly textured finish.
description: A blue, stylized AK-pattern rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and smooth matte finish. The design is simple and monolithic, with minimal surface detail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and barrel with front sight.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow barrel and front sight post, with the rifle's width minimized.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile of view 0, with the same features visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal width visible.
